steps.action: Validate configuration schema, tenant namespace, catalog, roles, feature flags, and provider truth status.
Create and hash a full rollback backup before any production write.
Install Core Engine repositories, task projection, approvals, logs, and health checks without business-specific terminology.
Install the selected Business Pack into its tenant namespace.
Run idempotent schema migration and record before/after counts.
Run static, runtime, permission, tenant-isolation, duplicate-action, catalog, Proof Log, Error Log, backup, and recovery tests.
Update only the approved existing deployment or create the explicitly approved tenant deployment.
Record URLs, versions, evidence, rollback point, provider states, and exact blockers.

hardStops: live provider labeled connected without proof
